mapper.select:
SELECT co.cl_order_id, co.cl_delivery_date AS cl_delivery_date, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, cod.detail_id, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remaining_qty) FROM ( SELECT pi.inbound_qty - COALESCE(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0) AS remaining_qty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY pi.inbound_id, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remaining_qty > 0 ) available ), 0) AS stock_qty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id
co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND (cod.detail_status IS NULL OR cod.detail_status != 'SHIPPED')
AND co.cl_delivery_date >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND co.cl_delivery_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY co.cl_order_id, co.cl_delivery_date, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, cod.detail_id
ORDER BY
co.cl_delivery_date co.cl_order_id c.client_name p.product_name co.cl_delivery_date
DESC ASC , p.product_name ASC, cod.detail_id ASC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT cod.detail_id AS detailId, cod.product_id, cod.order_qty, co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, p.product_name, COALESCE(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE cod.detail_id = #{orderDetailId}

SELECT pi.lot_no AS lotNo, (pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0)) AS remainingQty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY pi.lot_no, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remainingQty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC

SELECT cod.detail_id, cod.cl_order_id, cod.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, co.client_id, c.client_name, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no ), 0)) FROM product_inbound pi WHERE pi.product_id = cod.product_id ), 0) AS stock_qty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}

SELECT cd.delivery_id, cd.cl_order_id, f.client_name, cd.product_id, p.product_name, cd.lot_no, cd.delivery_qty, cd.delivery_date, cd.tracking_number, cd.delivery_status, cd.created_at FROM client_delivery cd JOIN product p ON cd.product_id = p.product_id JOIN client c ON cd.client_id = c.client_id JOIN ( /* ✅ 주문번호 단위로 한 줄만 가져오는 필터 서브쿼리 (정렬/페이지네이션 전용) */ SELECT co.cl_order_id, MAX(c.client_name) AS client_name, MIN(cd2.delivery_date) AS first_delivery_date /* 출하일자 정렬키 */ FROM client_order co JOIN client_delivery cd2 ON co.cl_order_id = cd2.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id
AND cd2.delivery_status != 'CANCELLED'
AND cd2.delivery_date >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND cd2.delivery_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM client_delivery d JOIN product p2 ON d.product_id = p2.product_id JOIN client c2 ON d.client_id = c2.client_id WHERE d.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND ( p2.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c2.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) )
GROUP BY co.cl_order_id
/* ✅ 정렬 화이트리스트 (소문자로 통일해서 비교) */ ORDER BY
co.cl_order_id client_name first_delivery_date first_delivery_date
DESC ASC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum} ) AS f ON cd.cl_order_id = f.cl_order_id
WHERE cd.delivery_status != 'CANCELLED'
/* ✅ 상세행은 그룹 정렬 유지 + 행 내부는 날짜/ID로 안정 정렬 */ ORDER BY
f.cl_order_id f.client_name f.first_delivery_date f.first_delivery_date
DESC ASC
, cd.delivery_date ASC , cd.delivery_id ASC

SELECT co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, cod.detail_id, co.cl_delivery_date AS cl_delivery_date, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remaining_qty) FROM ( SELECT pi.inbound_qty - COALESCE(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0) AS remaining_qty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY pi.inbound_id, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remaining_qty > 0 ) AS available ), 0) AS stock_qty FROM ( SELECT co.cl_order_id FROM client_order co JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN client_order_detail cod ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id
AND co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND (cod.detail_status IS NULL OR cod.detail_status != 'SHIPPED')
AND co.cl_delivery_date >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND co.cl_delivery_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM client_order_detail cod2 JOIN product p2 ON p2.product_id = cod2.product_id WHERE cod2.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND p2.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
GROUP BY co.cl_order_id ORDER BY co.cl_delivery_date ASC,
c.client_name co.cl_order_id co.cl_order_id
${sortOrder} LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum} ) g JOIN client_order co ON co.cl_order_id = g.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN client_order_detail cod ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE (cod.detail_status IS NULL OR cod.detail_status != 'SHIPPED') ORDER BY co.cl_delivery_date ASC,
c.client_name co.cl_order_id p.product_name co.cl_order_id
${sortOrder}, cod.detail_id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT co.cl_order_id FROM client_order co JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' /* ✅ 출하대기 상세가 1개 이상 존재해야 함 */ AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM client_order_detail cod WHERE cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND (cod.detail_status IS NULL OR cod.detail_status != 'SHIPPED') )
AND co.cl_delivery_date >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND co.cl_delivery_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM client_order_detail cod2 JOIN product p2 ON p2.product_id = cod2.product_id WHERE cod2.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND (cod2.detail_status IS NULL OR cod2.detail_status != 'SHIPPED') AND p2.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
GROUP BY co.cl_order_id ) t

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT cd.cl_order_id FROM client_delivery cd JOIN client c ON cd.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cd.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cd.delivery_status != 'CANCELLED'
AND cd.delivery_date >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND cd.delivery_date <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ( cd.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY cd.cl_order_id ) AS t
SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(delivery_id, -3) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM client_delivery WHERE delivery_id LIKE CONCAT('DLV-', #{today}, '%')

SELECT cd.product_id, p.product_name, cd.delivery_qty, cd.lot_no, cd.delivery_date, cd.tracking_number, cd.delivery_status FROM client_delivery cd JOIN product p ON cd.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cd.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} ORDER BY cd.delivery_date ASC

SELECT d.delivery_id, d.cl_order_id, d.delivery_qty, d.lot_no, d.delivery_status, d.tracking_number, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.product_id, co.client_id, c.client_name
FROM client_delivery d JOIN client_order co ON d.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id WHERE d.delivery_id = #{deliveryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE client_delivery SET delivery_status = '배송완료', updated_at = NOW() WHERE delivery_status = '배송준비' AND delivery_date <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
